article.title: Cyberreality: Industrial Ambient Electronic Production
article.subtitle: Textured noise constructions and spatial sound design define this experimental artist.
article.author: L. Nakamura
article.excerpt: Cyberreality operates at the intersection of industrial, ambient, and electronic music, crafting textured noise constructions and spatial sound design.

content.text: Cyberreality is an experimental electronic artist whose work spans industrial, ambient, and electronic production. Their output is characterized by textured noise constructions and spatial sound design, establishing a distinct presence within the broader experimental electronic network.

The artist has released several albums that showcase their approach to sound. These include CYBERROR, r e c u e r d o, and Internet Dating 1.5. Their work is further contextualized by compilation appearances, such as on Selected Juke Werkz, Vol. 1.

Recent releases demonstrate Cyberreality's continued exploration of electronic soundscapes. CYBERROR (Remixes) appeared in early 2022, followed by the album r e c u e r d o in January of that year. Earlier works include the original CYBERROR album from mid-2021 and Internet Dating 1.5 from late 2020.

Cyberreality's production choices emphasize layered textures and precise spatial arrangements. Their sound often incorporates elements of hyperbass, contributing to a dense and immersive listening experience that aligns with contemporary experimental electronic trends.
